name: Flip Tale
short_description: On his usual, weary walk home from work, the tired protagonist is suddenly pulled into a strange and fantastical world. He gains the power of “Flip”, which let him unveils a hidden truth and takes one step closer to discovering himself. Uncover the truth now in the narrative puzzle game Flip Tale.
detailed_description: The tired protagonist is on his way to work as usual, but was instantly involved in a strange and fantastic world. He gained the ability to "FLIP"-every FLIP is a step to uncover the truth and get close to himself. Players have to use this power to solve puzzles and explore, put back scattered clues, and embark on a journey to find the dreams. Immediately reveal the truth of the story in the narrative puzzle game "Flip Tale".
about_the_game: The tired protagonist is on his way to work as usual, but was instantly involved in a strange and fantastic world. supported_languages: Traditional Chinese, English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese
